description:
Define RenderResult type alias - this is a single line:

Location: crates/baml-bridge/src/prompt/renderer.rs

```rust
/// Result type for render operations
pub type RenderResult = Result<String, RenderError>;
```

This goes alongside RenderError in renderer.rs. It's intentionally minimal - just a convenient alias for the common return type.
title: Implement RenderResult type alias
